name: canvas
title: Dashboard Canvas
description: The dashboard's main editing plane: a flex column stacking a time ruler (tick scale + range slider) over a scrollable 2-column widget grid, with a floating 'Add widget' FAB pinned bottom-right. It is the composition surface for the canvas — ruler + widget-card(s) + fab — and ships lightweight placeholder widget cards so it previews in isolation without the live widget renderer. Cards support a wide modifier spanning both columns; includes an empty state, hover/focus-visible affordances on the tool buttons and FAB, and a disabled/locked treatment.
